stemHtml: According to the EU Regulation on Air Operations, when are aircrafts required to be equipped with no smoking signs? In an aircraft…

options.a: Having a Maximum Operational Passenger Seating Configuration of more than 9 seats.
options.b: In which NOT all the passenger seats are visible from the flight crew seats.
options.c: In which cabin crew members are NOT required to be carried on board.
options.d: Having a Maximum Certified Take-Off Mass in excess of 5700 kg.
